title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: opentelemetry-collector bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for opentelemetry-collector is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Collector with the supported components for a Red Hat build of OpenTelemetryBug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RFE] Update opentelemetry-collector to the newest upstream version (JIRA:RHEL-119363)

full_text:
An update for opentelemetry-collector is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Collector with the supported components for a Red Hat build of OpenTelemetryBug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RFE] Update opentelemetry-collector to the newest upstream version (JIRA:RHEL-119363)
